hero_subtitle: The ultimate fast, private, and secure tool suite for developers, creators, and marketers. All processing happens 100% in your browser.
seo_desc: MegaTools provides a comprehensive suite of online utilities that are fast, free, and secure. Unlike other tools, we process everything locally in your browser, meaning your data never leaves your device.
footer_about: The ultimate collection of 200+ browser-based tools for modern professionals. Fast, secure, and privacy-first.
feature_privacy_desc: Your data never leaves your device. All processing is done locally in your browser.
feature_speed_desc: Built with optimized JavaScript for instant results without server delays.
feature_global_desc: Available in multiple languages to serve users around the world.
